title: Level 555

{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 555: "Bloodlust Masquerade"}}__NOTOC__ {{Rewrite in Progress|date=31/05/2026 (school tommorow D:)|reason=old page that has unfortunately fell out of standards. The addenda are something aswell, redacting so much information! the level also tries to be edgy and scary, but with a clinical description it won't do that|author=some cat guy idk|rewriter=[[User:TheBackroomsMapMaker|Mr. MapMaker]] (i have ideas now)|progress=no.}} {{Content Warning|page=
{{Class 4|entity=Cognito Hazards}}
Level 555 is the 556th Level in the Backrooms.
==Explanation== {{Blurimage|file=Very Dark Living Room for Level 166.png|caption=Raw image from a photographer. (Photographer presumed deceased from mental trauma)}} '''Level 555''' resembles a small, cozy styled house from the late 1990s, decorated with bookshelves. The floor appears to be a type of carpet, with the color being around a beige-brownish color, though, it's coated in blood. The walls appear to be a type of pinewood and are also coated in blood. All DNA Tests of the blood have linked to the person who entered, strangely enough. There appear to be two more rooms, one being a kitchen, and the other being the bathroom. Both also appear to have the effect which happens during this level. '''Level 555''''s 2nd floor has two bedrooms, which, like the 1st floor, has the current level hazardous effect around the whole room. All windows only appear on the 2nd floor, though, it is unknown what the real appearance is. For humans, and all technology so far, the outside has only looked distorted, and like as if it's the void. All windows will not open, meaning you cannot jump out of the level. The whole level is almost always pitch black, with some portions of the area covered by candlelight. Foreign light sources (flashlights, torches, lanterns) work. However, when they shine visible light, it appears to be very dim, meaning it's only useful for watching your step.{{Blurimage|file=Dark Living Room for Level 166.png|caption=The foregoing image; has been brightened up for visibility and analysis. }} Recent samples taken from shattered lightbulbs and the dead "corpses" under an electron microscope appear to show they are an unidentified type of atom that has yet to be named, though, they have the same type of atoms. Other samples from the blood reveal it to be a person's mix who entered DNA and a mix of prehistoric animals'/plants' DNA. For some reason, some rooms appear to have a Black and White effect, making light appear black and white, and any color changing to one of the two colors. ==The Level 555 Effect== '''Level 555'''s effect appears to be an active cognitohazard, which occurs when a subject enters the level. Immediately, the smell of rotting corpses will swim around the level. After walking into one of the rooms, one will immediately start to feel as if they're standing on corpses or in a pool of blood. M.E.G. advises anyone who enters to not look down, and ignore it, due to what comes after looking at it. When a person looks at a corpse, the darkness will start to fade away, as the person sees every friend and family member lying on the ground, deceased. Some may have missing limbs, while others won't. Usually, a pool of blood surrounds them. When this transition occurs, the subject, or person, will start to fall into a pool of grief. Once in this state, they can't go back and are to suffer. During this state of mind, the person continues to cry out of grief and will feel a sense of hopelessness, guilt, and defenselessness wash over them. The most optimal position for people who are crying in this phase is the corners of rooms, where they hide and sob. At the end of this state, the person will begin to go insane whilst crying due to the hallucinations that continue to appear and will scream, sob, and yell, along with becoming extremely hostile. Right when they get over this stage, their vocal cords will burn, causing them to no longer be able to speak or scream, and will soon take their own life due to the grief. If the subject does not suffer from emotions, however, or has the mental capacity to withstand the emotions without grief or sorrow, the person will not suffer from the effects, and will immediately be brought out of the level. This is thought to be because, when one dies in the level, the hallucinations come to life and turn the now deceased person into one of the entities... ==Discovery and Exploration== The first discovery of Level 555 caused the original people who found it to speculate it was a Class 0 level due to it being pitch black, but once the first few sources of original lights found inside 555 were discovered, things drastically changed due to the stunning truth. The level only began to be discovered after a member of the crew survived and found an M.E.G. group and reported to them. After being transferred to the interviewing rooms at the main M.E.G. Hub, interviewers were stunned after hearing about how awful it was. The subject who survived later committed suicide due to severe PTSD and anxiety. Only one log to this date has been recovered, with it being the interview log, though, it has been confiscated and given to only the higher-ups of M.E.G. for analysis at this time. ==Entities== ===Documented Entities=== Only one documented entity has been found as of the latest searches: Entity- ''4xx CLIENT ERROR'' ===Undocumented Entities=== There appear to only be two entities, though, it's unknown what they both do. M.E.G. has decided to post one under the documented entities tab and one under the undocumented entities tab to separate the two. ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances === All known entrances are documented below, though, as many as a dozen of others have been speculated to exist. *After entering a house in [[Level 9]], it will link you up to here, though, this happens only in some buildings. *Finding a wooden door covered in a thick, red liquid on [[The Hub]] will bring you to this level. *Black doors in the expanse of [[Level 913]] lead here. ===Exits=== All known exits are documented below, though, as many as two dozen other exits have been speculated to exist * If one does not suffer from emotional distress, the cognitohazard will not work, and the person will immediately teleport to a random level, believed to be between Levels 51-549. *If one does survive the emotional distress caused by the cognitohazard, they will be brought to a random level, other times, [[Level 1000]]. ==Addendum Logs== '''NOTICE:''' The following documents have been locked under a Grade 9 Password. Please input the correct password to view the files listed.
Input Authorized Password

==File 1: Addendum Log== '''''' All known data will be stated here. All data is to be kept here and is locked under a Grade 10 Lock. Anyone who dares to leak this section will be isolated, questioned, and then killed. ''Author of Log: Kawai Saki'' 06:██: This level is weird... I don't know where to begin, even as the lead researcher in this area, I don't know where to begin and don't understand. I'll just write everything we've gotten so far. So uh... In the simplest form, well... Hm... How do I word this? It's like a cozy cabin of sorts, walls are pine, yadda yadda.. But uh, entities-wise... Well... I- I mean we think it's some sort of copy entity, that can read minds or something. Honestly, I can't think anymore because I'm exhausted and confused over this level. I wish we could just destroy it or something... 12:██: Well.. I'm running low on time and this is an assignment I was given, so I might as well put the theory here. The entity is a sort of ████████ that can somehow, I don't know, read minds. Hold on, why is it redacting ████████? Wait what? Well, I'll just ignore it for now. From what we know, this entity may be capable of reading the person's mind and turning into their family and friends, acting like decoys. This occurs right as the person enters, and, after entering, the whole house will immediately be covered in blood, and screams can be heard before they stop. This may be how the entity manifests. Hold on, let me grab some coffee... 12:██: Sorry, had to grab a cup of coffee, I pulled an all-nighter last night, but anyways. When the person suffers from the effects, the entity will start peeping around corners, and will pretend to be the corpse, or sometimes, just a clown. Yeah, this is all we, well, know of... ''New update available, processing now.'' ''Author of Log 2: Ivaan Khatri'' 07:██: My name is Ivaan Khatri, you may have seen the previous log documented by Kawai Saki, she has since left the central M.E.G. Documentation Office and has switched to the Exploration Teams of M.E.G. Recently, Level 555 has experienced some small but weird... I don't know, updates? For one the TV has began to play static and every few hours says some sort of number. It appears to be a countdown. We know this due to- ''4xx CLIENT ERROR'' 13:██: The data technician has fixed the error, we at the office don't know why it occurred in the first place, but I'm being told to take a break and focus on another database page. I will most likely return to this after that task, but the page appears to be dangerous due to cognitive hazards, so I might not be back. S███ █████ ██ █ m█ ████y ██ y██ s██ t██s. ''LAST KNOWN LOG EDIT: 7/5/21'' ''''''
